glue.table.skewedinfo.CfnAbout: Specifies skewed values in a table. Skewed values are those that occur with very high frequency.

glue.table.skewedinfo.SkewedColumnNames.Description: A list of names of columns that contain skewed values.

glue.table.skewedinfo.SkewedColumnValueL.Description: A mapping of skewed values to the columns that contain them.

glue.table.skewedinfo.SkewedColumnValues.Description: A list of values that appear so frequently as to be considered skewed.
